name: Dolphin Entertainment, Inc.
summary: Dolphin Entertainment, Inc. is a leading independent entertainment marketing and production company. Through subsidiaries 42West, The Door, Shore Fire, The Digital Dept., Elle Communications, and Special Projects, it provides public relations, strategic marketing, influencer marketing, social media, and celebrity booking services across motion picture, television, music, gaming, culinary, hospitality, lifestyle, and charitable industries. Its content production arm, Dolphin Films, develops and produces feature films and digital content primarily for family and young adult markets.

products.name: 42West
products.description: Public relations and marketing services for film, television, and gaming industries.

products.name: The Door Marketing Group
products.description: Public relations and marketing for culinary, hospitality, and lifestyle industries.

products.name: Shore Fire Media
products.description: Global public relations and marketing leader for the music industry.

products.name: The Digital Dept.
products.description: Influencer marketing via talent management, brand campaign strategy, and influencer event production.

products.name: Elle Communications
products.description: Public relations focused on impact, philanthropy, and non-profit sectors.

products.name: Special Projects
products.description: Celebrity booking firm connecting brands and events with celebrities and influencers.

products.name: Dolphin Films
products.description: Content production company developing and producing feature films and digital series for family and young adult markets.
